title: Lexpert’s 2025 Litigation Special Edition and Top 10 Business Decisions recognize our litigation expertise
content:
## Lexpert’s 2025 Litigation Special Edition and Top 10 Business Decisions recognize our litigation expertise
Lexpert has released its Special Edition: Litigation 2025 publication and once again we have been recognized for our market-leading litigation and dispute resolution expertise. Forty of our Lexpert-ranked lawyers were named leading litigators in Canada. We also represented clients in two of the Top 10 Canadian Business Law Decisions of 2024-2025, which highlights the most impactful and transformative judicial rulings affecting the Canadian business community:
Cheng v. Glencore plc , 2025 YKCA 8 : We successfully defended Glencore against a proposed securities class action in the Yukon Court of Appeal, in a case that considered jurisdictional reach and discontinued operations under Yukon’s Business Corporations Act . The team included Michael Feder, Shane D’Souza, Patrick Williams, Adam Taylor, Rene Sorell and Lindsay Frame.
Amazon.com.ca ULC v. Canada (Attorney General), 2024 FCA 217 : We represented the Canadian Association of Broadcasters in responding to an appeal at the Federal Court of Appeal from a CRTC decision that requires qualifying foreign-owned online streaming services to contribute a portion of their Canadian earnings to specific funds. The team included Steven Mason, Brandon Kain, Richard Lizius, Stephanie Willsey, Safia Thompson and Christina Vincent.
The following McCarthy Tétrault lawyers have been recognized as leading litigators in the 2025 Special Edition:
- Michael A. Feder, K.C.
- Julie-Martine Loranger
- Douglas T. Yoshida, K.C.
Lexpert Special Edition: Litigation 2025 also includes insights on emerging trends in business litigation and dispute resolution. Moya Graham discussed Ontario’s ongoing civil rules review and whether the proposed changes will streamline civil litigation and expedite business law and corporate disputes. Adam Goldenberg spoke about the future of AI in law and how it continues to transform the litigation and arbitration process.
Lexpert’s Top 10 Canadian Business Law Decisions is an eagerly awaited annual list that highlights the most significant court rulings in Canada. The Lexpert Special Edition: Litigation showcases top-ranked litigation lawyers and their exceptional efforts in defending client interests.
McCarthy Tétrault’s Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group gets to the heart of the real business issues, manages matters with objectivity and clarity and buffers your company against disruption. We do not waste time or reputation on pointless posturing. We seek satisfactory resolution or a successful outcome in court. Major businesses count on McCarthy Tétrault when they confront complex disputes, whether in Canada or internationally. Through our offices across Canada, we provide all the resources needed to handle complex and multijurisdictional disputes in either official language. Learn how our team can help you .

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact: media@mccarthy.ca .
